---
title: "Marumbi"
format:
  html:
    sidebar: false
---

## Fotos das Aulas de Campo no Marumbi - Formandos Biologia PUCPR

![](marumbi.webp){fig-align="center" width="500"}

### Ano de 2024

[![](icofoto.webp){width="50"}](https://mega.nz/folder/KzoDyJia#diHdseoEGec1m1InYccG9A){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

### Ano de 2025

[![](icofoto.webp){width="50"}](https://mega.nz/folder/LvRWjCzT#HD3WZ8GVASDn6rf45UAlfQ){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
